jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Simplilearn - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Simplilearn in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Simplilearn:
Simplilearn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Simplilearn!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
